DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION NTC OF DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT FOLLANSBEE, JULIA HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JULIA FOLLANSBEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CAUSE OF ACTION IS BARRED BY ONE YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. [CCP SECTION 340.6(A).] COURT GRANTS REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. REQUESTS FOR ORDER BARRING WEBB FROM FILING SUBSEQUENT LAWSUITS AND NOTIFYING STATE BAR OF WEBB'S ALLEGED VIOLATION OF PROBATION DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JULIA FOLLANSBEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Mark L. Webb, Esq. Law Offices of Mark L. Webb (415) 621-4500 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiff and opposing party; Nelson E. Brestoff, Esq. of Nelson E. Brestoff Professional Law, (818) 787-4077 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CAUSE OF ACTION IS BARRED BY ONE YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. [CCP SECTION 340.6(a).] COURT GRANTS REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. REQUESTS FOR ORDER BARRING WEBB FROM FILING SUBSEQUENT LAWSUITS AND NOTIFYING STATE BAR OF WEBB'S ALLEGED VIOLATION OF PROBATION DENIED. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
